holdings.infoBox: KDEF is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hyundai Rotem Company stock at 18.45%, Hanwha Aerospace at 17.86%, LIG Defense&Aerospace at 5.88%, HD Hyundai Heavy Industries at 4.65%, and Korea Aerospace Industries at 3.98%.

overview.description: The PLUS Korea Defense Industry Index ETF (KDEF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Korea Defense Industry index. The fund is passively managed to track an index which provides concentrated exposure to Koreas leading defense companies. The fund uses an AI program to identify, score and select companies for industry relevance KDEF was launched on Feb 5, 2025 and is issued by PLUS.

data.title: South Korea Inflation Accelerated to 26-Month High in May
data.text: The benchmark consumer-price index rose 3.1% from a year earlier in May, reflecting the effects of higher oil prices amid Middle East tensions and the won's weakness against the U.S. dollar.

data.title: Bank of Korea Holds Rates Steady, Raises Inflation and Growth Forecasts
data.text: South Korea's central bank held rates steady at its first meeting under Gov. Shin Hyun-song, but kept the door open to policy tightening as it forecast higher growth and inflation.

data.title: Goldman Sachs says AI and energy resilience are creating a North-South divide in Asian markets
data.text: Investors are focusing on AI developments in North Asia. China is coming out of more than three years of deflation measured by the producer price index.

data.title: Korean Stocks Are Up 89%. Hedge Funders Suggest How to Play It.
data.text: South Korea is often-overlooked but its stock market is the hottest in the world this year. The boom is led by chip powerhouses SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics.
